entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop known for high protein and oil content and socio-economic significance

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: A nutritional quality attribute of groundnut

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: A nutritional quality attribute of groundnut

entities.name: DEVELOPMENTAL BIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the growth and development of the groundnut plant

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: Activities aimed at improving crop characteristics through genetic selection

entities.name: PEG
entities.description: A specialized reproductive organ, also known as a gynophore, in groundnut

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing genetic traits to improve crop performance

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural production of the groundnut crop

entities.name: PEG DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The formation and directional growth of the peg

entities.name: GENETIC CONTROL
entities.description: The molecular and physiological mechanisms that regulate peg development

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS
entities.description: The study of the transcriptome to understand regulatory events in peg development

entities.name: PROTEOMICS
entities.description: The study of the proteome to understand regulatory events in peg development

entities.name: MIRNA-REGULOMICS
entities.description: The study of miRNA regulation to understand regulatory events in peg development

entities.name: POD FORMATION
entities.description: The process of developing pods, which is influenced by peg development
